grammar.explanation: Used to indicate two qualities or actions existing at the same time ('both... and...').

grammar.explanation: Both mean 'or', but 还是 is used in questions, while 或者 is used in statements.

grammar.point: The particle 着 (zhe) indicating the manner of an action
